title: React Todo App
description: A React-based task management application demonstrating CRUD operations, state management, and component-based architecture.

title: Weather App
description: A weather forecasting application that fetches real-time weather data from external APIs and displays current conditions and forecasts.

title: Expense Tracker
description: An expense management application that allows users to track income, expenses, and overall financial health.

title: Netflix Clone
description: A Netflix-inspired streaming platform UI built with React, featuring movie browsing and responsive design.

title: E-Commerce Store
description: A shopping cart application showcasing product listings, cart functionality, and checkout flow.

title: Chat Application
description: A real-time chat platform with messaging functionality, user authentication, and modern UI components.
